(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who are recipients of a Star of Texas Award under Chapter 3106 (Star of Texas Awards) , Government Code. The license plates must include the Star of Texas Award emblem and the words “Star of Texas.”

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.416 — Star of Texas Award Recipients

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who are recipients of a Star of Texas Award under Chapter 3106 (Star of Texas Awards) , Government Code. The license plates must include the Star of Texas Award emblem and the words “Star of Texas.”

(b) The surviving spouse of a person who was the posthumous recipient of an award described by Subsection (a) is entitled to specialty license plates issued under this section.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 477 (H.B.627), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2023.*
